 ACTION                                                                                                                                            │            RELATED
 Event:                ec2:RunInstances                                                                                                            │  IAM Roles
 Category:             Insight / AwsApiCall                                                                                                        │  IAM Users
 Insight type:         ApiCallRateInsight                                                                                                          │  EC2 Instances
 State:                Start                                                                                                                       │  S3 Buckets
 CONTEXT                                                                                                                                           │  S3 Objects
 Region:               us-east-1                                                                                                                   │  Lambda Functions
 Recipient:            999999999999 (cross-account)                                                                                                │  RDS Instances
 Time:                 2026-04-07T09:14:00Z                                                                                                        │  KMS Keys
                                                                                                                                                   │  Secrets
                                                                                                                                                   │  VPC Endpoints
                                                                                                                                                   │  Security Groups
                                                                                                                                                   │  DynamoDB Tables
                                                                                                                                                   │  CloudFormation Stacks

                                                                                                                                                   │  CT events by Username
                                                                                                                                                   │  CT events by EventName
